seoTitle: About Jireh Cooler | South Florida AC Company Since 1994
metaDescription: Jireh Cooler is a family-operated, state-certified air conditioning company serving Broward and Palm Beach County since 1994.
heading: Family-Operated. State-Certified. South Florida, Since 1994.
intro: Jireh Cooler has provided air conditioning installation, repair, and maintenance to South Florida homes and businesses since 1994. The company is owned and operated by Moyses Oliveira, a graduate of South Technical Education Center, alongside his wife Evelise Oliveira.
story: Jireh Cooler was built on a simple idea: South Florida homeowners and business owners deserve an air conditioning company they can actually reach, and actually trust, when something goes wrong.

For three decades, that has meant showing up, diagnosing the real problem, and doing the work right the first time, whether it's a same-day repair on a 95-degree afternoon or a full system replacement planned months in advance.
As a family-operated business, Jireh Cooler is led directly by its owners rather than a corporate call center, and every job carries that same level of personal accountability.

values.label: Certified Expertise
values.description: State-Certified Air Conditioning Contractor, license CAC1815741, insured for residential and commercial work.

values.label: Direct Accountability
values.description: Owner-operated since 1994, with hands-on involvement in how jobs are scoped, priced, and completed.

values.label: Always Available
values.description: Emergency service available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year.

values.label: Built to Last
values.description: Work performed to code, with major brands including Carrier, Bryant, Rheem, Goodman, and Lennox.

imageAlt: Jireh Cooler owner and technician on a service call in South Florida
